item.title: NUCLRGOLF: NUCLR GOLF @NUCLRGOLF · 17min #SCHEFFLER SURGING — Scottie is 4-under through 7 so far on Moving Day at Hilton Head. Ju
item.description:
NUCLR GOLF @NUCLRGOLF · 17min #SCHEFFLER SURGING — Scottie is 4-under through 7 so far on Moving Day at Hilton Head. Just two shots off Fitzpatrick’s lead.
@SchefflerFans De PGA TOUR 3 4 40 8 mil

item.title: Betgolfworld: Niall Lyons @Betgolfworld · 17min I am so tired of football it is an absolute load of nonsense Cita Pilib De Brún (Phil
item.description: Niall Lyons @Betgolfworld · 17min I am so tired of football it is an absolute load of nonsense Cita Pilib De Brún (Phil Brown) @Malachians · 1h There is simply no way or no reasonable explanation why this was a red card 4 days ago and it isn’t now. We’ll never know why because of some moral imperative that referees are never asked to explain these decisions 3 691

item.title: JustinRayGolf: Justin Ray @JustinRayGolf · 36min This is the 6th time in Scottie Scheffler's PGA Tour career he's opened a round -5 or
item.description:
Justin Ray @JustinRayGolf · 36min This is the 6th time in Scottie Scheffler's PGA Tour career he's opened a round -5 or better through 6 holes (3rd time this season).
His scores the previous 5 times he did it: 62 62 64 63 63 1 1 27 4 mil

item.title:

item.description:
PGA TOUR @PGATOUR · 39min He birdied 6. Two back. Cita PGA TOUR @PGATOUR · 42min Saturday charge from Scottie
4-under in 5 holes and now 3 back of the lead @RBC_Heritage.
Golf Channel 3 5 71 28 mil
